description: A designed recruitment graphic built to look like a clean screenshot of a Truth Social / X post by Donald Trump. On a white background, the top shows a profile row with a circular American-flag-overlaid avatar, the name 'Donald J. Trump' with a pink/magenta verified checkmark and a dark Truth Social badge, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The quoted post body in large black text reads: 'Our Brave ICE Law Enforcement Agents are getting the WORST of the WORST Criminals out of our Country -- Terrorists, pedophiles, MS-13 gang members, murderers, rapists, drug and human traffickers. They're getting these SLEAZEBAGS, the SCUM of the Earth that Crooked Joe Biden let in, OUT OF HERE, and getting them out, FAST. We need MORE courageous men and women to, MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. Join ICE now. We will take GREAT care of you, just like you take care of us!' followed by the blue link 'join.ice.gov/'. Below is a rendered link-preview card: 'join.ice.gov / America Needs You | ICE / America Needs You. We're recruiting.' The messaging technique combines presidential endorsement, demonization of immigrants ('SCUM of the Earth', 'SLEAZEBAGS'), partisan attack on Biden, and a patriotic recruitment call to action. Target audience is potential ICE recruits and Trump supporters.
notable_text: Our Brave ICE Law Enforcement Agents are getting the WORST of the WORST Criminals out of our Country; MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN. Join ICE now; America Needs You | ICE; join.ice.gov
